hooks.command: bash -c 'cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo .)" && EDITED=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E "\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|css|json)$" | head -5); if [ -n "$EDITED" ]; then echo "Code was edited but no dev server is running. If the change is observable in a browser preview (per <when_to_verify>), call preview_start and follow <verification_workflow>. If not, end your turn without mentioning this check — do not announce that you are skipping." >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0'
